mission_10:
name: Complete CI/CD Pipeline
on: [push]
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm run lint
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run build
      - run: npm run deploy
      - name: Notify
        if: always()
        run: echo "Pipeline completed!"
